title: Congestion Pricing Wins in Court After Lengthy Battle With Trump
author: Stefanos Chen and Winnie Hu
fullText: A judge ruled to preserve the toll, ending, for now, a dispute that has become emblematic of New York’s resistance to federal intervention in local affairs.
summary: A judge ruled to preserve the toll, ending, for now, a dispute that has become emblematic of New York’s resistance to federal intervention in local affairs.
